title: Nintendo Switch Consoles Will No Longer Be Sold From Mid-February 2027 Onwards — at Least in Europe
description: After almost a decade on sale, Nintendo will no longer sell its original Switch console — including Switch Lite and Switch OLED models — from mid-February 2027 onwards in Europe.

title: Walmart Has the Lowest Price on a GeForce RTX 5070 Prebuilt Gaming PC in 2026
description: The CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme even has the new 2026 Intel Arrow Lake Refresh CPU.

title: The Coslus C20 Cordless Rechargeable Water Flosser Drops 83% to Just $6.99
description: Even gamers should practice good oral hygiene.

title: Magic: The Gathering’s Avatar: The Last Airbender Beginner Box Drops to Its Lowest Price Ever at Amazon
description: You can score $15 off the MTG x Avatar: The Last Airbender Beginner Box today, as it's dropped to its best price ever at Amazon in a new sale.

title: The LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot Set Is Retiring Soon, but Amazon Has It on Sale for $36 Right Now
description: The LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot set is on sale for $35.99 at Amazon, 20% off its list price of $44.99. It's set to be retiring soon, so now is a great time to grab it.
